pose-open-soft.png.note: Softer open-hand frame to bridge the first transition.

pose-relaxed-open.png.note: Relaxed open posture before the curl accelerates.

pose-thumb-open.png.note: Thumb remains wide while the inner fingers start folding.

pose-curl-soft.png.note: Early curl frame for a smoother open-to-grip change.

pose-claw.png.note: Curved claw posture in the middle of the grip sequence.

pose-grip-mid.png.note: Deeper grip frame before the hand gets almost closed.

pose-grip-tight.png.note: Near-closed grip frame to bridge claw and hook.

pose-hook.png.note: Tight hooked grip just before the full fist.
